source_jobs.title: Founding GTM Operator (£150k+)
source_jobs.description:
WHAT WE’RE BUILDING?

The last major technological shift - the rise of the consumer internet - created LinkedIn as the networked winner in recruitment. The next great shift is here. AI is transforming how people and companies connect and it will redefine the global labor market.

At Jack & Jill, we are building the company that leads this transformation.

We’re 9 months old, have released two agentic products (Jack and Jill), have built a brilliant team of Europe’s best engineers, operators and ex founders, are run rating over £1m revenue and have raised $20M, led by tier-1 VC Creandum (Lovable, Spotify, Black Forest Labs, Bolt) Read more on TechCrunch. https://techcrunch.com/2025/10/16/jack-jill-raises-20-million-to-bring-conversational-ai-to-job-hunting/

In the coming years, every knowledge worker will have an AI agent managing their career, and every company will have an AI agent helping them hire.

By connecting those agents, we’re building a new infrastructure for the future of the labor market itself.

If that vision excites you, come help us build it.




MEET JACK & JILL

We are not putting a thin AI layer on broken processes. We are rebuilding from first principles with two dedicated agents who work for their users:

 - Jack, for candidates: An always-on career co-pilot. Jack starts with a deep conversation to understand who you are and what you really want. He provides market insights, coaching, and companionship.

 - Jill, for companies: A true AI talent partner. Jill goes far beyond a job description to deeply understand your company, your culture, and the real context behind a role. She sources candidates, reviews inbound applicants, conducts first-pass screening calls, and acts as a strategic thought partner.

Jack & Jill will not just disrupt the existing recruitment software market, but also the 10x bigger recruitment services market.




WE’RE MOVING AT BREAKNECK SPEED

We’re 9 months old, and already built two remarkable products, have 100,000+ candidates using Jack, hundreds of paying customers signed up to Jill and built a spectacular early team. The technology is ready and 10x better than the status quo – we need to build and execute at a relentless speed to build on this early momentum and bring it to the world as fast as we can.

We have thousands of users having an incredible experiences with Jack & Jill:

 - Sharing their love https://www.linkedin.com/posts/saaras-mehan_a-few-days-ago-one-of-our-beta-users-posted-activity-7320462989428428808-0ASo?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop&rcm=ACoAABLbD3wBvBMDWoc3lhBJMMx5W62BrhPXk2A

 - On TikTok https://www.linkedin.com/posts/matthew-wilson-671a757a_one-of-our-beta-testers-lois-posted-this-ugcPost-7320471268103782407-qjwe?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop&rcm=ACoAABLbD3wBvBMDWoc3lhBJMMx5W62BrhPXk2A

 - And everyone knows about it https://www.linkedin.com/posts/saaras-mehan_you-dont-have-to-have-a-phd-in-ai-from-stanford-activity-7321516596571656192-lqsB?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop&rcm=ACoAABLbD3wBvBMDWoc3lhBJMMx5W62BrhPXk2A
   


WHAT IS THE ROLE AND WHO ARE WE LOOKING FOR?

We're hiring Jill's first dedicated seller. You'll report directly to the B2B GTM Lead and sit right in the flow between product, engineering, and customers.

Your job is simple: build the new business engine from scratch and grow revenue.

This is a high-ownership, high-consequence role. You won't get a playbook on day one. You'll write it. If you want clear lanes and a tidy task list, this isn't for you. If you want real autonomy, direct access, and a straight line between what you ship this week and whether revenue moves next week, this is as good as it gets.

You'll own the full new business motion: first touch through to a role going live in Jill. You'll start by doing things manually to learn what works, then build the playbooks, tooling, and loops that scale it.

This is a founding role. The work will evolve as we grow.

What you'll actually do

 - H

She sources candidates, reviews inbound applicants, conducts first-pass screening calls, and acts as a strategic thought partner.

We have thousands of users having an incredible experiences with Jack & Jill:

 - Sharing their love https://www.linkedin.com/posts/saaras-mehan_a-few-days-ago-one-of-our-beta-users-posted-activity-7320462989428428808-0ASo?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop&rcm=ACoAABLbD3wBvBMDWoc3lhBJMMx5W62BrhPXk2A

 - On TikTok https://www.linkedin.com/posts/matthew-wilson-671a757a_one-of-our-beta-testers-lois-posted-this-ugcPost-7320471268103782407-qjwe?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop&rcm=ACoAABLbD3wBvBMDWoc3lhBJMMx5W62BrhPXk2A

 - And everyone knows about it https://www.linkedin.com/posts/saaras-mehan_you-dont-have-to-have-a-phd-in-ai-from-stanford-activity-7321516596571656192-lqsB?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop&rcm=ACoAABLbD3wBvBMDWoc3lhBJMMx5W62BrhPXk2A


THE ROLE

Two-thirds of our team are ex-founders. Matt took Omnipresent from $0 to $20M ARR in three years, then a $600M valuation. Saaras took Kular, YC-backed, from $0 to $3M ARR in twelve months.

The immediate job is to increase awareness of Jack & Jill and acquire SF-headquartered companies as customers. This means working rooms, running events, signing partnerships, talking to founders, and converting relationships into sign-ups.

We're specifically looking for someone to build and scale our VC and Ecosystem Partnerships channel as one of our core acquisition strategies.

You're defining how we enter a market: you're not managing a channel, you're building one that doesn't exist yet.

San Francisco is our most important market and we’re investing heavily into our motion here. We have two people on the ground today, but that’s about to change. You’ll be one of the first hires on the ground and help shape our SF GTM.


WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR

The technology is ready and 10x better than the status quo – we need to build and execute at a relentless speed to build on this early momentum and bring it to the world as fast as we can.

We have thousands of users having an incredible experiences with Jack & Jill:

 - Sharing their love https://www.linkedin.com/posts/saaras-mehan_a-few-days-ago-one-of-our-beta-users-posted-activity-7320462989428428808-0ASo?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop&rcm=ACoAABLbD3wBvBMDWoc3lhBJMMx5W62BrhPXk2A

 - On TikTok https://www.linkedin.com/posts/matthew-wilson-671a757a_one-of-our-beta-testers-lois-posted-this-ugcPost-7320471268103782407-qjwe?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop&rcm=ACoAABLbD3wBvBMDWoc3lhBJMMx5W62BrhPXk2A

WHO ARE WE LOOKING FOR?

We’re looking for a Founding Product Designer to join the team.

As our first design hire, you’ll take complete ownership of understanding and shaping how users interact with our products, collaborating closely with the whole team to shape a world-class experience for our users.

You’ll think strategically, tactically and aesthetically about the user experience of interacting with Jack & Jill. You’ll consider the wide surface area of our products - users interact with Jack & Jill through voice and audio, as well as via written & visual mediums.

Today’s AI technology affords us an entirely new interface for how people find their dream job - as such this is an entirely new kind of product. You’ll be a deeply empathetic, first principles thinker, shaping how agentic AI systems interact with humans to effectively optimise for the best experience possible.

 - Jill, for companies: A true AI talent partner. Jill goes far beyond a job description to deeply understand your company, your culture, and the real context behind a role. She sources candidates, reviews inbound applicants, conducts first-pass screening calls, and acts as a strategic thought partner.

Jack & Jill will not just disrupt the existing recruitment software market, but also the 10x bigger recruitment services market.




WE’RE MOVING AT BREAKNECK SPEED

We’re 9 months old, and already built two remarkable products, have 100,000+ candidates using Jack, hundreds of paying customers signed up to Jill and built a spectacular early team. The technology is ready and 10x better than the status quo – we need to build and execute at a relentless speed to build on this early momentum and bring it to the world as fast as we can.

We have thousands of users having an incredible experiences with Jack & Jill:

 - Sharing their love https://www.linkedin.com/posts/saaras-mehan_a-few-days-ago-one-of-our-beta-users-posted-activity-7320462989428428808-0ASo?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop&rcm=ACoAABLbD3wBvBMDWoc3lhBJMMx5W62BrhPXk2A

 - On TikTok https://www.linkedin.com/posts/matthew-wilson-671a757a_one-of-our-beta-testers-lois-posted-this-ugcPost-7320471268103782407-qjwe?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop&rcm=ACoAABLbD3wBvBMDWoc3lhBJMMx5W62BrhPXk2A

 - And everyone knows about it https://www.linkedin.com/posts/saaras-mehan_you-dont-have-to-have-a-phd-in-ai-from-stanford-activity-7321516596571656192-lqsB?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop&rcm=ACoAABLbD3wBvBMDWoc3lhBJMMx5W62BrhPXk2A




WHO ARE WE LOOKING FOR?

We’re looking for Founding Engineers to help us build Jack & Jill into the default way people find jobs!

You’ll be a great fit if:

🧠 You’re smart

We’re building at pace in an ambiguous, changing environment. We believe that general intelligence correlates highly with performance, particularly in such a context.

🎯 You’re product-focused

You want to make a real difference how millions of people spend most of their lives! We’re building at the bleeding edge of AI, but we’re not academics. Regardless of whether it’s by using the latest AI models or by simply talking to a customer; it’s the impact that matters to you, and you’re able to think about the customer, the product and the technology simultaneously.

🏆 You’re an ambitious overachiever

You’ll have shown your ambition and excellence in your life. Whether that’s academically, professionally, in a sporting context, or in wh

notes: High-growth startup with AI-powered recruitment products, strong engineering team, and recent VC funding.
